data.title: 国际服 超电磁炮T联动特别PV 御坂美琴
data.summary: Student from another world, special video episode 1! Here is special in-game footage of Misaka Mikot
data.body:
Student from another world, special video episode 1!
Here is special in-game footage of Misaka Mikoto!

Even one strike from her 'railgun' is incredibly powerful!

⬇️Promotional Video (HD)⬇️
